title: X (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Xwing-ROOCE.png|thumb|right|300px|The distinctive X shape of an X-wing starfighter]]
'''X''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''[[X-wing starfighter]]''' and its various models
*'''[[Xesh]]''', the [[Aurebesh]] letter that equaled the High Galactic character X.
*'''[[Planet X]]''', a [[planet]] that was the [[homeworld]] of the [[Nameless]]
*'''[[Clone X trooper]]''', who were, in turn, active under a '''[[Clone X trooper division]]''', including the '''[[CX squad]]'''
**'''[[Clone X]]'''
**'''[[CX-1]]'''
**'''[[CX-2]]'''
**'''[[Sniper CloneX3]]'''
**'''[[Sniper CloneX4]]'''
**'''[[Sniper CloneX5]]'''
**[[Unidentified Clone X trooper]]

==Legends==
*[[X (droid)|'''X''']], an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]]
*"[[X (interviewee)|'''X''']]," a citizen of the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]
*"'''[[Stormtrooper X]]'''," a dangerous [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]
*'''[[Watcher X]]''', an [[Imperial Intelligence (Sith Empire)|Imperial Intelligence]] [[operative]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
*'''[[Xasha]]''', a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] nicknamed "X"
*The [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|'''X-wing starfighter''']] and it's various models
*[[Xesh/Legends|'''Xesh''']], the [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] letter that equaled the High Galactic character X

==Real-world==
*The social media platform '''X''', formerly known as Twitter. The citation template for it remains at [[Template:Twitter]]

==See also==
*[[CX (disambiguation)]]
